headline: Ulta Beauty (ULTA) Stock Slides as Market Rises: Facts to Know Before You Trade
summary: In the closing of the recent trading day, Ulta Beauty (ULTA) stood at $558.55, denoting a -1.04% move from the preceding trading day.

headline: Alphabet Cloud AI Push And Valuation Outlook After Gemini And TPU News
summary: Alphabet's Google Cloud unit introduced new TPU 8t and 8i AI chips, the Gemini Enterprise Agent Platform, and a $750m fund to support enterprise AI adoption at its recent Cloud Next conference. The announcements are tied to partnerships across sectors, including companies such as Nvidia, Broadcom, Marvell, Merck, Salesforce, Deloitte, and Ulta Beauty. For investors watching Alphabet (NasdaqGS:GOOGL), these Google Cloud AI announcements come with the stock trading around $338.89 and very...

headline: Congresswoman Discloses Hundreds Of Thousands In Stock Trades, Here's What She Bought
summary: A member of Congress recently bought hundreds of thousands of dollars in stocks, marking her first trades since 2024.
